data.title: State of Crypto: Unsettled U.S. Crypto Tax Scene
data.description:

data.title: Grayscale Submits Polkadot and Cardano ETF Registration Forms to SEC
data.description:
Grayscale Investments filed comprehensive S-1 registration forms with SEC for spot Polkadot and Cardano exchange-traded funds as Grayscale Cardano Trust ETF (GADA) and Grayscale Polkadot Trust ETF join crowded field of 92 pending crypto ETF applications currently awaiting regulatory review.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/grayscale-submits-polkadot-and-cardano-etf-registration-forms-to-sec/

data.title: Bitcoin falls 3% to $109,436 as whale manipulation triggers $350M liquidation wave
data.description:
30-8-2025 – Bitcoin dropped nearly 3% to $109,436 on Friday as traders blamed coordinated whale activity for manipulating short-term price action and triggering over $350 million in long position liquidations across cryptocurrency markets. Market analysts identified large inflows involving market maker Wintermute and deliberate liquidity shifts designed to force capitulation among retail traders. Trader Merlijn described [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/bitcoin-falls-3-to-109436-as-whale-manipulation-triggers-350m-liquidation-wave/

data.title: Ethereum PoS Network Faces Significant Queue Delays
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Ethereum Proof-of-Stake (PoS) network is experiencing substantial delays in its validator queues. The current exit queue stands at 1,024,545 ETH, which is approximately valued at $4.45 billion based on current prices. The withdrawal delay is reported to be 17 days and 19 hours.

At the same time, there is an increase in demand for staking by new validators. The entry queue has risen to 808,910 ETH, valued at about $3.51 billion. The current waiting period for new validators to activate is 14 days and 1 hour.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Uncertainty Amid Market Caution and Key Economic Data
data.description:
According to PANews, Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks. live, shared insights in a Chinese community briefing, highlighting a cautious and slightly bearish sentiment in the current market. The group generally perceives Bitcoin's recent performance as weak, with the critical price level of 108 being repeatedly tested without strong support. Members discussed the potential impact of a weekly MACD death cross, which could lead to institutional and large-scale investors exiting the market
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/29013928096193?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/gryphon-digital-mining-to-merge-with-trump-linked-american-bitcoin/

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Uncertainty Amid Market Caution and Key Economic Data
data.description: According to PANews, Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, shared insights in a Chinese community briefing, highlighting a cautious and slightly bearish sentiment in the current market. The group generally perceives Bitcoin's recent performance as weak, with the critical price level of 108 being repeatedly tested without strong support. Members discussed the potential impact of a weekly MACD death cross, which could lead to institutional and large-scale investors exiting the market. They are also focused on the potential volatility that could arise from the non-farm payroll data release on September 5. The market is seen as lacking clear direction at present. On-chain data revealed a selling pressure of $3.5 billion yesterday. Interestingly, while Bitcoin experienced a significant drop, altcoins showed relative resilience, prompting a deeper analysis of the current market structure.

data.title: Bitcoin is for payments; store of value is ‘just a neat byproduct’: BitVM creator
data.description:
The debate about Bitcoin as a method of payment versus a store of value is ongoing. With prices consistently above $100k, the relentless push from ETF issuers and Bitcoin treasury companies, and the inevitable institutionalization of the space, using Bitcoin for small payments seems more alien than ever.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitcoin-is-for-payments-store-of-value-is-just-a-neat-byproduct/
